paths.@/lib/doc/store: Import from @/lib/doc/hooks/ — the store is a private module.
paths.@/lib/session/store: Import from @/lib/session/provider or @/lib/session/hooks — the store is a private module.
paths.@/hooks/useBuilder: Deleted in Phase 6. Use @/components/builder/BuilderProvider for the provider, @/lib/doc/hooks/* for doc state, @/lib/session/hooks for session state.
paths.@/lib/services/builderStore: Deleted in Phase 6. The legacy builder store no longer exists.
